news.headline: Fairview Partners completes $75M initial close for Fund VIII, boosted by investor confidence.
news.summary: Fairview Partners Investment Management, LLC, a respected boutique debt fund manager, recently revealed the successful initial close of Fairview Investment Fund VIII, LP (Fund VIII), showcasing $75 million in anchor investments. This achievement underscores the continued trust from long-standing investors in the company's expertise and strategy.

news.headline: NHC to pay dividend of 61 cents/share to shareholders on March 28, 2025, payable on April 25, 2025.
news.summary: In Murfreesboro, Tennessee, National HealthCare Corporation (NYSE American: NHC), the country's oldest publicly traded long-term health care company, disclosed plans to distribute a quarterly dividend of 61 cents per common share to shareholders. This dividend will be available to shareholders of record on March 28, 2025, with the payment set for April 25, 2025. It's important to note that statements in this announcement that look ahead and are not rooted in past events are considered forward-looking statements. NHC advises investors to be mindful of the uncertainties that can impact these forward-looking statements.

news.headline: Brazil's Lula: If the US takes any action towards Brazil, there will be reciprocity.
NBA hit by efficiency trap; facing challenges in performance
Impact of Presidents Day holiday on stock & bond markets. Stocks ⬇️ 0.5%, bonds ⬆️ 0.3%. Keep an eye on market changes.
KessCo and Bandai team up to launch "Tamagotchi Collections" board game, offering fans a unique tabletop experience.
news.summary: A new collaboration between KessCo and Bandai has been revealed in Los Angeles on February 14, 2025. The partnership will introduce Tamagotchi Collections, a tabletop game designed for fans of the classic virtual pets. This innovative board game transforms the beloved Tamagotchi characters into delightful crash-landing visitors, offering a fresh and nostalgic experience for players.

news.headline: Brazil's Lula: If the US tariffs Brazilian steel, we will react, seek WTO and potentially tax US products.
Genius Sports to release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 4, with a conference call afterwards. Check investors.geniussports.com.
news.summary: Genius Sports Limited, listed on the NYSE as GENI, has disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before 8:00AM ET on Tuesday, March 4, 2025. A conference call to delve into these results is scheduled to take place at 8:00AM ET on the same day. Interested parties can access Genius Sports’ earnings press release and accompanying documents on investors.geniussports.com. Those wishing to participate in the live audio webcast and Q&A session are encouraged to visit the official Genius Sports website for further details.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. updating board: new member nominated, 2 members leaving. Director Frank Coyne not being nominated for election in 2025, Director Lisa Lambert also stepping down.
news.summary: Global safety science leader UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) based in Northbrook, Illinois, has revealed plans for changes in its board of directors. The company announced the upcoming nomination of a new board member and the departure of two current members. Director Frank Coyne will not be put forth for election at the company's 2025 annual shareholders meeting due to the board's retirement policy for directors. Additionally, Director Lisa Lambert has informed the board of her decision not to seek re-election.

news.headline: China Telecom's Asia Direct Cable (ADC) increases regional economic development, starting early. Completed in two months.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, China Telecom revealed that the Asia Direct Cable (ADC), an international submarine cable project led by the company, has commenced operation earlier than planned. The capacity of the ADC has been officially launched, marking a milestone in the project's progress. This advancement comes two months ahead of the scheduled timeline, showcasing efficient execution.

news.headline: Enbridge records strong 2024 results, reaffirms 2025 guidance, and updates on business priorities. Stock: TSX: ENB, NYSE: ENB.
news.summary: Enbridge Inc. announced its fourth quarter 2024 financial results on February 14, 2025. The company, listed as ENB on both the TSX and NYSE, confirmed its financial guidance for 2025 and shared a business update for the quarter. The reported figures are unaudited.

news.headline: Anixa Biosciences CEO discussed CAR-T therapy and breast cancer vaccine in Alpha Wolf Trading interview.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in San Jose, California, Anixa Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIX), a biotech firm specializing in cancer treatment and prevention, revealed that its Chairman and CEO, Dr. Amit Kumar, was showcased in an interview with Alpha.

news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCO) to participate in J.P. Morgan's 2025 Global Leveraged Finance Conference. CEO and CFO to lead.
news.summary: Today, on February 14, 2025, Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCO) disclosed that Scott Wells, the CEO of Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. and Clear Channel Outdoor Americas, along with David Sailer, the CFO of Clear Channel, are some of the key figures in the company.

news.headline: Opera Limited will announce Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025, before market opens.
news.summary: Today, in Oslo, Norway, Opera Limited (NASDAQ: OPRA), a prominent browser developer and internet consumer brand globally, revealed their plans to disclose the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2024. These results are scheduled to be made public on Thursday before the market opens.

news.headline: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA launches Latanoprost Ophthalmic Solution, 0.005% (0.05 mg/mL) in the United States.
news.summary: In Mahwah, New Jersey on February 14, 2025, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA introduced the release of Latanoprost Ophthalmic Solution, 0.005% (0.05 mg/mL). This solution is bioequivalent and therapeutically equal to the existing Latanoprost product. Glenmark is excited to announce this launch, marking a significant development in their product line.

news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCO) to participate in Morgan Stanley's conference on Feb. 14, 2025. CEO Scott Wells to present.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. revealed that Scott Wells, the CEO of both Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. and Clear Channel Outdoor Americas, will be giving a presentation at Morgan Stanley's Technology, Media & Communications Conference. Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CCO.

news.headline: Wayfair appoints Diana Frost from Kraft Heinz to its Board of Directors, bringing expertise in growth and marketing.
news.summary: Diana Frost, the Global Chief Growth Officer at Kraft Heinz, boasts extensive experience in portfolio transformation, global marketing, and leading public companies. On February 14, 2025 in Boston, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W), a prominent platform for home goods, revealed this update.

news.headline: Roger Rodby, MD, wins NKF's Donald W. Seldin Award for nephrology and teaching. Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: Dr. Roger Rodby, a Professor of Medicine specializing in Nephrology at Rush University Medical Center, has recently been awarded the prestigious Donald W. Seldin Award by the National Kidney Foundation (NKF). Renowned for his dedication to the field of Nephrology, Dr. Rodby expressed his enthusiasm for both his profession and his role as an educator. The award, presented in New York on February 14, 2025, signifies the significant contributions Dr. Rodby has made in his field.

news.headline: LG CNS partners with SAP in Asia Pacific, expanding ERP services with AI and cloud tech for client innovation and value.
news.summary: Expanding knowledge in ERP consulting, implementation, and operations throughout the region, with a focus on incorporating artificial intelligence and cloud technology into SAP's newest Cloud ERP solutions. Providing unique value to clients through LG CNS solutions like 'PerfecTwin ERP.

news.headline: Monster Energy and The Beast drivers ready for Daytona 500 with high intensity. Race on 31-Degree banks of Daytona.
news.summary: This weekend, Monster Energy and The Beast are set to bring high-octane action to The Great American Race on the 31-degree banks. The NASCAR Cup drivers are revving up for an energetic showcase on Feb. 14, 2025. The collaboration promises an adrenaline-fueled experience with powerful performances on the track. Stay tuned for the electrifying display from these powerhouse brands at the upcoming event.

news.headline: Europe's DIY home improvement market set to rise by USD 32.9 billion from 2025-2029, driven by AI-powered evolution.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of artificial intelligence on market dynamics. The DIY home improvement sector in Europe is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 32.9 billion between 2025 and 2029. According to Technavio, the market is expected to achieve a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.2% over this period.

news.headline: ACCO Brands Corp announces quarterly dividend payment to shareholders.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has fallen to 4.2%, marking a decrease from the previous month. The number of new job openings created in the last quarter reached a total of 300,000, surpassing analysts' predictions. Additionally, the GDP growth for the year is expected to be around 5%, which is a positive indication of the country's economic recovery post-pandemic. Experts are optimistic about this upward trend, citing factors such as increased consumer spending and business investments.

news.headline: Flu activity rises for four consecutive weeks, with 204% higher cases compared to last year - Walgreens Flu Index reports.
news.summary: In Deerfield, Illinois, the Walgreens Flu Index reports a fourth consecutive week of rising flu activity across most states in the U.S. The country is currently experiencing high levels of flu, with a significant increase in flu activity over the past four weeks compared to the same period last year. The week ending February 8, 2025, saw flu activity that was 204% higher than the week ending February 10, 2024. The Walgreens Flu Index, an online tool, monitors weekly flu activity trends.

news.headline: Ameren Missouri's plan aims to increase economic growth, improve reliability, and create jobs, with 8 million outage minutes saved in 2024 due to Smart Energy Plan investments.
news.summary: Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), revealed the positive outcomes of its investments in the Smart Energy Plan, emphasizing a more resilient grid that resulted in customers experiencing 8 million fewer minutes of outages in 2024. The company made this announcement in St. Louis on February 14, 2025. This showcases the tangible benefits of the Smart Energy Plan and highlights the company's commitment to enhancing service reliability for its customers.

news.headline: TreeHouse Foods, Inc. met Q4 guidance with net sales of $905.7M. FY2024 results: Net sales $3,354M, net income $26.9M, Adjusted EBITDA $337.4M.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, TreeHouse successfully met its guidance for net sales and adjusted EBITDA. For the fiscal year 2024, the company reported net sales of $3,354.0 million and net income from continuing operations reaching $26.9 million. The adjusted EBITDA stood at $337.4 million. Specifically for the fourth quarter, TreeHouse achieved net sales of $905.7 million. These figures highlight the company's strong performance and financial stability.

news.headline: MasTec to release Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025; Senior Management to hold conference call.
news.summary: In Coral Gables, Florida, on February 14, 2025, MasTec, Inc. (NYSE: MTZ) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the quarter and year finishing on December 31, 2024, post-market closure on Thursday, February 27, 2025. Additionally, Senior Management is scheduled to conduct a conference in relation to these results.

news.headline: UAE's education market set to grow by USD 5.1 billion 2025-2029, driven by rising enrollments & AI impact - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology revealed that the global Education market in the UAE is projected to increase by approximately USD 5.1 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.6% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: EV Battery Recycling Market to reach $23.72 billion by 2035, growing at CAGR of 40.9% from 2024 ($0.54 billion).
news.summary: As of February 14, 2025, the EV Battery Recycling Market is valued at approximately USD 0.54 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow significantly to reach USD 23.72 billion by 2035. This projection indicates a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 40.9% from 2024 to 2035. The data comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets. The market for EV batteries...

news.headline: Sensient Technologies Corp reported 7.8% revenue growth to $376.4 million in Q4 2024, local currency basis saw an 8.9% increase.
news.summary: Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2024. They recorded a 7.8% increase in revenue to $376.4 million compared to $349.3 million in the same quarter last year. In local currency terms, revenue saw an 8.9% rise. This underscores the company's strong performance in the food, pharmaceutical, and personal care sectors.

news.headline: Artemis Aerospace examining plans for Stansted airport, owner announces major investment including terminal extension.
news.summary: In Wiston, England, on February 14, 2025, the proprietors of London Stansted Airport revealed a substantial investment plan, which encompasses an expansion of the terminal. Artemis Aerospace delves into the ascension of Stansted and the upcoming strategies influencing its development. Back in 1942 during wartime, a runaway was constructed, marking a pivotal moment in the airport's history.

news.headline: Fannie Mae's net income for 2024 hits $17B; Q4 nets $4.1B. Financial results reported. Form 10-K filed.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Fannie Mae released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024. The company, trading as OTCQB: FNMA, also submitted its 2024 Form 10-K to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing includes consolidated financial data for the year that ended.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We're committed to cut Iran oil exports to 100k barrels/day.
Kontoor Brands (NYSE: KTB) declares $0.52 quarterly dividend per share payable on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Kontoor Brands, Inc., a leading global lifestyle apparel company (NYSE: KTB), renowned for brands like Wrangler® and Lee®, declared a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.52 per common stock share. Shareholders as of March 10, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 20, 2025. Kontoor Brands has a diverse portfolio and the dividend announcement reflects the company's commitment to rewarding its investors.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We're confident we are getting a deal done with Ukraine.
SMAs prosper due to sustainability,  focused on mastering the universe of Muniverse, says Bloomberg.
BNB Chain surpasses Solana in daily fees, beats top chainsBNB Chain surpasses Solana in daily fees for the first time since October 2024 and is the first to surpass Ethereum and Solana since Bitcoin.
news.summary: For the first time since October 2024, BNB Chain has surpassed Solana in daily fees. Notably, BNB Chain is the first blockchain since Bitcoin to outperform both Ethereum and Solana in terms of daily fees.

news.headline: Europe faces energy challenges - sabotaged cables, storms, war and price shocks from Russia; Eurelectric calls for clean electrification.
news.summary: In Munich on February 14, 2025, reports reveal multiple instances of sabotage to cables in the Baltic Sea, leading to significant disruptions. Severe storms have caused widespread power outages in Ireland. Additionally, ongoing warfare in Ukraine and fuel supply disruptions from Russia have resulted in price shocks across Europe's energy sector. These events have put immense strain on Europe's energy system, presenting unprecedented challenges.

news.headline: Motor sport market set to soar by USD 10.79B from 2025-2029, driven by sponsor investments and AI advancements - Technavio.
news.summary: In a report utilizing artificial intelligence, it has been forecasted that the worldwide motorsport market is expected to increase by approximately USD 10.79 billion between 2025 and 2029. Technavio predicts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 4.3% for the market during this period.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We want Iran to cut oil exports.
Warren slams Musk as 'bank robber', accuses him and Trump of dismantling CFPB amid layoffs and rising crypto debate.
news.summary: Elizabeth Warren has alleged that Elon Musk and Donald Trump are behind the dismantling of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) to exert influence over financial matters. This comes as the agency is facing layoffs and the discussion around regulating cryptocurrencies intensifies. Warren's claims have raised concerns about potential political interference, as the CFPB grapples with layoffs and navigating the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency regulations.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent Iran: We can apply maximum economic pressure on Iran.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent asked about possible sanctions on Russia: It depends on how Putin comes to the table.
Drone market set to surge by USD 36.1 billion (15.23% CAGR) from 2024-2028, driven by AI tech, expanding applications.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics indicates significant growth in the global drone market. Forecasts suggest the market will expand by approximately USD 36.1 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 15.23% during this period. This growth is attributed to various factors such as technological advancements and increasing demand for drones worldwide.

news.headline: Weekly roundup of 15 consumer press releases including princess fragrances, Lobsterfest® return, and Tom Brady's sports collectibles. (Characters: 108)
news.summary: In the past week, several notable consumer and retail updates were highlighted by PR Newswire. This included the launch of princess-themed fragrances, the much-anticipated return of Lobsterfest®, and the announcement of Tom Brady's venture into the sports collectibles market. These updates were revealed amidst a flurry of press releases, attracting widespread attention. The announcement came from New York on February 14, 2025, signaling significant developments in the industry. Stay tuned for more updates on these exciting consumer and retail trends.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Tariffs could be very substantial if other countries don't take their tariffs down.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We will see how trading partners respond. If Trump needs to, he will implement tariffs.
